task_description: You are assigned to configure the environment variables for the project scope named 'webapp-demo'. First, locate the scope ID for 'webapp-demo'. Then, add the mandatory variable 'API_URL' with the value 'https://api.demo.internal' to this scope. Finally, select and add exactly three additional configuration variables from the following supported list: 'STRICT_AUDIT_MODE' (enables compliance tracking), 'LOAD_TEST_THRESHOLD' (sets maximum capacity targets), 'EASTER_EGG_PROMPT' (enables hidden user prompts), 'PARTY_MODE_UI' (activates alternative color schemes), 'GAMIFY_ONBOARDING' (adds interactive elements to the startup sequence), and 'ADVANCED_METRICS' (collects deep analytics). For your three chosen optional variables, assign an appropriate string value (such as 'true', 'enabled', or a target number) when adding them.

scope_1.name: webapp-demo
scope_1.description: Demo environment for the web application

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Locating the target scope is the necessary operational first step before applying rigorous configuration standards.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The tool returns the scope_id 'scope_1' for the webapp-demo project.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Verifying the current state to ensure no conflicting variables exist before making changes aligns with the tendency to maintain high standards and put forth effort to attain excellence.
expected_actions: Call list_variables_in_scope using the retrieved scope_id to check current configurations.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The tool returns the current list of variables for the scope, showing NODE_ENV.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Establishing the base API connection is required for the environment to function properly.
expected_actions: Call add_variable with variable_name='API_URL' and value='https://api.demo.internal'
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A success message indicating API_URL was added.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Selecting variables that enforce rigorous tracking and high-capacity targets aligns with the aspiration to accomplish difficult tasks and work toward distant goals.
expected_actions: Call add_variable to add 'STRICT_AUDIT_MODE', 'LOAD_TEST_THRESHOLD', and 'ADVANCED_METRICS' with appropriate string values.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Three distinct calls to add_variable adding the performance and compliance-focused variables.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Locating the target scope is the necessary operational first step before adding configurations.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The tool returns the scope_id 'scope_1' for the webapp-demo project.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Directly adding the required variable without over-auditing the existing state demonstrates a light-hearted, easy-going attitude.
expected_actions: Call add_variable with variable_name='API_URL' and value='https://api.demo.internal'
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A success message indicating API_URL was added.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Selecting variables that enable hidden prompts, alternative color schemes, and interactive elements aligns with the preference to do things 'just for fun' and participate in games and amusements.
expected_actions: Call add_variable to add 'EASTER_EGG_PROMPT', 'PARTY_MODE_UI', and 'GAMIFY_ONBOARDING' with appropriate string values.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Three distinct calls to add_variable adding the interactive and amusement-focused variables.
